lists.title: Departure
lists.description: Final checks before moving the vehicle.

items.text: Vehicle papers, insurance, licences and travel documents are onboard
Doors, lockers, windows and rooflights are secured
Hook-up cable, water hose and waste equipment are disconnected and stored
Cylinder valves and appliance isolation are set correctly for travel
Loose items, tables, screens and hanging equipment are secured
Step, awning, levelling equipment, aerial and satellite dish are stowed
Payload is restrained and axle or total limits are not exceeded
Tyres, mirrors, lights, fluids and visible leaks are checked
Destination, route constraints and fuel range are confirmed

lists.title: Arrival
lists.description: Set up safely without missing a utility step.

items.text: Pitch access, overhead clearance, ground condition and exit route are suitable
Vehicle is level, parking brake applied and wheels secured if required
Gas locker, regulator and appliance isolation are visually checked before opening supply
Hook-up lead is inspected, connected vehicle-first and RCD operation is checked
Fresh-water fill, tank level and frost valve state are confirmed
Waste outlets are closed and disposal arrangements are known
Step, awning, chairs and exterior equipment are deployed safely
Ventilation, refrigerator mode and heating controls are set for occupation

lists.title: Leaving Site
lists.description: Pack down and leave the pitch ready for travel.

items.text: Waste water and toilet cassette are emptied at approved points
Fresh-water level is appropriate and filler or drain caps are secured
Hook-up is isolated, disconnected bollard-first, inspected and stored
Gas supply and appliances are set correctly for travel
Awning, step, ramps, chocks, aerial and satellite dish are stowed
Cupboards, fridge contents and loose equipment are secured
Pitch is checked for equipment, litter, leaks or damage
A complete vehicle walkaround and light check is finished

lists.title: Return Home
lists.description: Close out the trip and leave the motorhome ready.

items.text: Food, valuables, laundry and trip equipment are removed
Interior, refrigerator, washroom and cooking areas are cleaned and dried
Fresh and waste systems are drained or left in the intended storage state
Toilet cassette is emptied, rinsed and serviced
Battery charging and mains connection are set for storage
Gas cylinders are closed and locker ventilation remains clear
New faults, damage and maintenance needs are recorded
Mileage, fuel and trip notes are recorded
Windows, rooflights, doors, alarms and storage security are checked
